subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto those who follow that which hath been revealed from God, the Omnipotent, the Almighty, wherein mention is made of His handmaidens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لقوم اتبعوا ما نزل من لدی الله المقتدر القدیر یذکر فیه امائه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
